43:1:1.m: Ha Meem (special letters at start of chapter)

43:3:3.m: as a complete book for recitation

43:3:5.m: surely perhaps you all/definitely so that you all (connects to تَعْقِلُونَ)

43:3:6.m: you all understand (so that you all may understand)

43:4:1.m: and indeed it (referring to the Quran)

43:4:2.m: in (location within أُمِّ ٱلْكِتٰبِ - the Mother of the Book)

ٓ: (location within أُمِّ ٱلْكِتٰبِ - the Mother of the Book)

43:4:4.m: the book (in أُمِّ ٱلْكِتٰبِ - Mother of the Book)

43:5:7.m: a people (object of أَفَنَضْرِبُ - should we turn away)

43:5:8.m: those who definitely go beyond limits (describes قوما)

43:8:1.m: so we destroyed (in response to أَشَدَّ)

43:8:5.m: and he passed by (connected to فَأَهْلَكْنَآ - then We destroyed)

43:8:7.m: the first ones (plural, referring to previous nations)

43:9:2.m: you asked them (about who created the heavens and earth)

43:9:3.m: who (asking about the creator of السَّمٰوٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضَ)

43:9:8.m: he created them (referring to السَّمٰوٰتِ 'the heavens')

43:9:10.m: The All-Knowing (attribute of Allah in this ayah)

عَلِيمُ: All-Knowing (attribute of Allah in this ayah)

43:10:1.m: The one who (describes جَعَلَ - the one who made)

43:10:8.m: in it/her (referring to الْأَرْضَ - the earth)

43:10:10.m: so that you all might (do تَهْتَدُونَ)

43:11:2.m: he sent down repeatedly (subject of وَٱلَّذِى - and the One who)

43:11:5.m: water (as the object being sent down)

ًۢ: as the object being sent down

43:11:7.m: so/then we brought to life (acted on بَلْدَةً - a land)

43:12:1.m: and the one who/that which (subject of خَلَقَ)

ٱلَّذِى: the one who/that which (subject of خَلَقَ)

43:12:3.m: the pairs/types (object of خَلَقَ - He created)

43:12:4.m: all of them (referring to الْأَزْوٰجَ - the pairs)

43:13:1.m: so that you all become balanced

43:13:11.m: and you all say (so that you say سُبْحٰنَ)

43:13:14.m: he made completely subservient (referring to Allah in this ayah)

43:13:16.m: this (referring to what was just mentioned)

هٰذَا: this (referring to what was just mentioned)

43:13:20.m: those who have power/control (object of كُنَّا)

43:14:1.m: and indeed we (to رَبِّنَا - our Lord)

43:15:1.m: and they made (something into something for لَهُ)

43:15:2.m: for him (object of جَعَلُوا - they made)

43:15:5.m: a part (object of جَعَلُوا - they made)

43:15:7.m: the human being (object of جَعَلُوا - they made)

43:15:8.m: truly/indeed a constant denier/rejecter (referring to mankind in general)

43:15:9.m: a very clear one (describing something that makes things obvious)

43:16:6.m: and He chose you all (as His special ones)

43:17:3.m: one of them (subject of بُشِّرَ - was given news)

43:17:7.m: an example (object of ضَرَبَ - set forth)

43:18:5.m: and he (subject of غَيْرُ مُبِينٍ - not clear)

43:19:2.m: the angels (object of جَعَلُوا - they made)

وْ: (shows it's about something that didn't happen)

43:20:4.m: The Most Merciful One (subject of مَا عَبَدْنٰهُم)

43:20:15.m: they guess without knowledge (subject of قَالُوا)

43:21:2.m: we brought them/gave to them (كِتٰبًا - a book)

43:21:4.m: from (emphasizing the start point of قَبْلِهِۦ 'before it')

ن: (emphasizing the start point of قَبْلِهِۦ 'before it')

43:21:8.m: they are firmly holding/grasping (subject of فَهُم)

43:22:2.m: they said (responding to what came before)

43:22:4.m: we found (part of what they said)

43:22:7.m: a way/community (that we found our forefathers following)

43:24:13.m: with/by him/it (referring to أَهْدَىٰ - better guidance)

43:25:1.m: and so we took revenge (from مِنْهُمْ)

43:26:1.m: and when (connecting to قَالَ - he said)

43:26:7.m: free/innocent (from مِمَّا تَعْبُدُونَ - what you worship)

43:27:4.m: so indeed he/it (referring to the One who created me)

43:28:1.m: and he made it (referring to كَلِمَةً 'word/statement') into (بَاقِيَةً 'lasting')

43:28:2.m: a word (as the object being made lasting)

43:29:3.m: these ones (in a way that connects to what comes after)

ءِ: (in a way that connects to what comes after)

43:29:5.m: until, up to (جَآءَهُمُ - before they came)

43:30:6.m: magic (subject of قَالُوا - what they said)

ٌ: subject of قَالُوا - what they said

43:30:8.m: with/by it (referring to الْحَقُّ - the truth)

43:32:20.m: as something to be mocked (object of يَتَّخِذَ)

43:33:6.m: one (feminine, as a description of أُمَّةً/nation)

43:33:7.m: we would surely make (consequence in response to لَوْلَا/if not for)

43:33:9.m: he rejects/denies (referring to one who rejects belief in الرَّحْمٰنِ - the Most Merciful)

43:33:12.m: roofs (as the object being made in this verse)

ًا: (as the object being made in this verse)

43:33:15.m: and many places to go up (that they climb upon)

مَعَارِجَ: many places to go up (that they climb upon)

43:33:17.m: they appear/ascend (referring to the people climbing upon their houses)

43:35:1.m: and decoration/adornment (coordinated with previous items in list)

43:35:4.m: that, that one (masculine singular demonstrative pronoun)

43:35:5.m: when/as soon as (connecting مَتٰعُ with what came before)

43:35:11.m: your Lord (possessed by you, after عِندَ)

43:35:12.m: for the ones who guard against evil

43:36:3.m: away from (something being turned away from ذِكْرِ)

43:36:5.m: The Most Merciful (one of Allah's names)

43:36:8.m: a devil (object of نُقَيِّضْ - we assign)

43:36:11.m: a close companion (of him - referring back to مَن in the ayah)

43:37:6.m: that they (subject of يَحْسَبُونَ - they assume)

43:38:3.m: he came to us (subject of قَالَ - he said)

43:38:4.m: he said (introducing what comes next in the ayah)

43:38:9.m: the two easts (after the word بُعْدَ meaning 'distance')

43:38:10.m: and how bad! (expressing strong disapproval of the companion mentioned)

بِئْسَ: how bad! (expressing strong disapproval of the companion mentioned)

43:38:11.m: the close companion (as the subject speaking in this verse)

ُ: (as the subject speaking in this verse)

43:39:6.m: that you all (are partners in punishment)

43:39:9.m: those who share together (in the punishment)

43:40:3.m: the deaf ones (object of تُسْمِعُ - make hear)

43:40:6.m: the blind ones (object of تُسْمِعُ - you make hear)

43:40:9.m: in (something that is ضَلٰلٍ مُّبِينٍ - clear error)

43:40:10.m: a clear state of being lost (after في/in)

43:42:7.m: those who are truly powerful (subject of فَإِنَّا)

43:43:1.m: so hold firmly! (as a command to Prophet Muhammad ﷺ)

43:43:4.m: to you (object of أُوحِىَ - was revealed)

43:44:1.m: and indeed it (referring to the Quran)

43:45:8.m: did we make/establish? (asking about آلِهَةً - gods)

43:45:12.m: deities (as objects being worshipped in يُعْبَدُونَ)

43:45:13.m: they are worshipped (referring to false gods in آلِهَةً)

43:47:2.m: he came to them (subject of يَضْحَكُونَ - they laugh)

43:47:3.m: with Our signs (that were brought to them)

43:48:13.m: they go/come back (in response to العَذَابِ/the punishment)

43:49:6.m: your Lord (being called upon in ٱدْعُ)

43:50:4.m: the punishment (object of كَشَفْنَا - we removed)

43:52:2.m: I (strongly emphasized, speaking about Pharaoh in this context)

۠: (strongly emphasized, speaking about Pharaoh in this context)

43:52:6.m: who/which/that (referring to هٰذَا - this - from previous phrase)

43:52:10.m: he almost does/is almost doing (something) (subject of يُبِينُ)

43:53:1.m: Then why not (questioning why أَسْوِرَةٌ weren't given)

43:53:11.m: those who are joined together (with the angels)

43:54:3.m: and so they obeyed him (actively/willingly) (result of فَٱسْتَخَفَّ قَوْمَهُۥ - he made his people light/foolish)

43:54:5.m: they were (subject of فَأَطَاعُوهُ - so they obeyed him)

43:54:6.m: a people (object of فَٱسْتَخَفَّ - he made light of)

43:55:5.m: so We drowned them (after they angered Us)

43:57:3.m: son (subject of this phrase, referring to Jesus)

ُ: subject of this phrase, referring to Jesus

43:57:5.m: an example (object of ضُرِبَ - was struck/given)

43:57:6.m: when (referring to يَصِدُّونَ - they turn away)

43:57:9.m: they are turning away (referring to قَوْمُكَ - your people)

43:58:7.m: they presented it (as an example about ءَأٰلِهَتُنَا)

43:58:10.m: in argument (describing how they did something)

43:58:14.m: those who argue/dispute (subject of هُمْ قَوْمٌ)

43:59:8.m: an example (object of جَعَلْنٰهُ - we made him)

43:60:8.m: they come after/replace/succeed (referring to angels who would succeed humans on earth)

43:61:2.m: surely a knowledge (of السَّاعَةِ - the Hour)

43:61:6.m: about it/her (referring to السَّاعَةِ - the Hour)

َ: (as the object being feared in فَٱتَّقُوا۟)

43:64:1.m: indeed/truly (emphasizing that اللَّهَ is my Lord and your Lord)

43:64:7.m: this (pointing to the straight path that will be mentioned)

هٰذَا: this (pointing to the straight path that will be mentioned)

43:65:1.m: and then they differed (with each other)

43:65:5.m: so woe (connected to فَٱخْتَلَفَ before it)

سَّاعَةَ: Hour (referring to the Day of Judgment)

43:66:5.m: that (connects what they are waiting for)

43:66:10.m: they perceive (referring to those who deny the Hour)

43:67:5.m: enemy (subject of يَوْمَئِذٍۭ - on that day)

43:68:5.m: today (when there will be no fear)

43:68:8.m: you (all) feel sad (in response to لَا خَوْفٌ عَلَيْكُمُ)

43:69:4.m: and they were (believers in our signs)

43:70:1.m: all of you enter! (command to a group)

43:70:4.m: and your spouses (referring to multiple people)

43:71:12.m: the eyes (subject of تَلَذُّ - finds pleasure)

43:71:15.m: ones who last forever (describing أَنتُمْ 'you all')

43:72:4.m: you all were made to inherit it

43:72:7.m: you (all) do/perform (referring to the deeds that earned you Paradise)

43:74:6.m: those who remain forever (plural, in a regular case)

43:75:6.m: those who are in despair (subject of هُمْ)

43:76:4.m: they were (plural masculine subject of ٱلظَّالِمِينَ)

43:76:6.m: the people who wrong others (acted upon by كَانُوا)

43:78:7.m: those who dislike/hate (describes أَكْثَر - most of you)

43:79:5.m: those who make firm (subject of أَبْرَمُوٓا۟)

43:80:2.m: they think/consider (that they know what أَنَّا لَا نَسْمَعُ - that We do not hear)

43:80:11.m: they write (our messengers write their secrets)

43:82:1.m: glorified, exalted above all imperfection (describes رَبِّ)

43:82:8.m: they describe (referring to those who attribute false things to Allah)

43:83:3.m: and they play (connected to يَخُوضُوا۟ - they indulge)

43:83:5.m: they meet with/encounter (in the future, referring to يَوْمَهُمُ - their Day)

43:83:6.m: their day (object of يُلٰقُوا - they meet)

43:84:5.m: a deity/god (in the heavens and earth)

43:85:1.m: and He is blessed/exalted (referring to Allah)

43:85:8.m: between them both (referring to السَّمٰوٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ)

43:85:11.m: of the Hour (referring to knowledge of Judgment Day)

43:86:8.m: except (those who testify to the truth)

43:87:8.m: they are turned away (from the truth)

43:88:2.m: O Lord! (calling out to Allah in the ayah)

43:89:6.m: they know (referring to the disbelievers being addressed in the ayah)
